src/it/java/org/bff/javampd/BaseTest.jav.general_idea: Update method call from getDatabaseManager to getMusicDatabase to match refactored API.

src/it/java/org/bff/javampd/album/MPDAlb.general_idea: Update the way database managers are accessed to use a new unified entry point.

src/it/java/org/bff/javampd/artist/MPDAr.general_idea: Update the method call to retrieve the artist database from the new MusicDatabase interface instead of the old DatabaseManager.

src/it/java/org/bff/javampd/file/MPDFile.general_idea: Update test to use the new MusicDatabase API instead of the deprecated DatabaseManager.
Remove checked exceptions from test signatures and imports as the underlying API no longer throws them.
Correct file comparison logic to use getPath() instead of getName() to match the new API contract.

src/it/java/org/bff/javampd/genre/MPDGen.general_idea: Update the method call to retrieve the genre database from the new MusicDatabase API instead of the old DatabaseManager.
